author: mark
text:
skill: frame worktree as the unit of work

Promote the worktree principle from a buried Important bullet into a
standalone section under the default-flow framing. Reads as
declarative philosophy ("the worktree *is* your workflow while a task
is claimed") rather than reactive prohibition, with the consequences
of editing the operating branch directly stated explicitly.

Existing references in the Workflow code block and Important bullet
list now point at the new section instead of restating it.
